case_title: UNIFIED TELDATA, INC. VS. DEBORAH MOUGEOTTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UNIFIED TELDATA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOUGEOTTE, DEBORAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFIED TELDATA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOUGEOTTE, DEBORAH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIFIED TELDATA, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOUGEOTTE, DEBORAH THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY SUBMITTED WERE NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT THE $8,333.33 PAYMENT WAS A RETENTION BONUS, AS DISTINCT FROM A RETROACTIVE SALARY ADJUSTMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-09-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOUGEOTTE, DEBORAH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFIED TELDATA, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
